title: redis-agent-memory values
description: Schema for the redis-agent-memory Helm chart values. Enforced by `helm install`/`helm upgrade` via Helm's built-in JSON Schema validation (see https://helm.sh/docs/topics/charts/#schema-files). Anything not defined here is accepted — the schema's job is to catch typos and invalid values on the keys we care most about, not to document every field.

security.description: Application-level security posture selector. See chart README section "FIPS-oriented posture" for the list of guardrails each profile activates.

profile.description: Allowed values: "" (default, no app-level FIPS guardrails) or "fips" (opt-in FIPS-oriented posture). Any other value is rejected at install/upgrade time so typos can't silently fall back to the default posture.

tests.description: Gate for the `helm test` hooks shipped with this chart. When enabled, the chart renders test Pods plus a minimal Role + RoleBinding scoped to `get` on the release Deployments. Defaults to false so clusters that never run `helm test` get no extra RBAC.

enabled.description: When true, render the `helm test` hooks. Defaults to false.

smoke.description: Optional public API smoke test run by `helm test` when both tests.enabled and tests.smoke.enabled are true.

enabled.description: When true with tests.enabled=true, render the public RAM API smoke test Pod.

storeId.description: Store ID configured in the mounted memory-dataplane config and used by the smoke test API paths.

image.description: Container image used to run the API smoke script.

controlplane.description: On-prem Control Plane (admin store API). Disabled by default. When enabled, controlplane.image.tag, controlplane.config.existingSecret/secretKey, and an admin-token source (existingSecret or autoGenerate) are required — enforced at install/upgrade time by the chart's validate helper.

enabled.description: When true, render the control-plane Deployment + Service (+ auto-generated admin-token Secret). Defaults to false.
